title: BackPack Pro
description: Worried about losing items after death? Backpack Pro keeps them safe—vanilla style with Extraa Storage.
body:
# Backpack Pro

<font color="red"> [ Worried about losing your items after death? Looking for a vanilla-friendly solution? ] </font>

Backpack Pro adds simple, powerful, and vanilla-friendly backpacks to Minecraft, giving you extra storage without breaking immersion—while also protecting your stored items after death.

But there’s a catch: each time you die, one random item from the backpack is dropped, adding a bit of risk to your survival.

🎒 Features

**Multiple Backpack Tiers**
  
- 🪨 Iron Backpack
- 💎 Diamond Backpack
- 🖤 Netherite Backpack
  
**Expandable Storage**
- Each tier provides increased inventory space
  
**Portable Inventory**
- Access your backpack anytime with a single key/button
  
**Durability System**
- Backpacks have durability
- ⚠️ Losing durability on death adds a strategic element
  
**Clean GUI**
- Custom-designed interfaces for each tier
- Matches Minecraft’s vanilla style
  
**⚙️ How to Use**
- Craft a backpack
- Keep it in your inventory or offhand
- Press the keybind (default: B) or right-click to open
- Store your items safely
  
**🎯 Design Goals**
- Vanilla-friendly experience
- Lightweight and performance-friendly
- No unnecessary complexity
- Fits naturally into survival gameplay
